goals.title: Establish Online Presence & Credibility
goals.statement: Launch a professional website at softercolor.com that establishes Softercolor as a credible custom software development and AI consulting firm to prospective enterprise clients.
success_criteria: Website is live at softercolor.com with HTTPS
All five pages complete and accessible
Brand identity consistent across all pages
open_questions: Is there a target launch date?

goals.title: Communicate Service Offering Clearly
goals.statement: Ensure prospective clients can clearly understand Softercolor's three service offerings and self-identify the right service for their needs.
success_criteria: Services page describes all three offerings
kpis: Avg. time on Services page > 45 seconds

goals.title: Generate Qualified Consultation Inquiries
goals.statement: Convert website visitors into qualified leads by directing them to submit a contact inquiry via the contact form, routed to info@softercolor.com.
success_criteria: Contact form functional with four inquiry types
kpis: Contact form submission rate > 2% of unique visitors
open_questions: Should form submissions also be stored in MySQL as backup?

goals.title: Achieve Organic Discoverability
goals.statement: Ensure the website ranks for relevant search terms related to custom software development and AI consulting services.
success_criteria: SEO metadata, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, schema.org in place at launch
Analytics tracking configured from day one
kpis: Google Search Console: 0 errors at launch
Organic impressions growing month-over-month within 90 days

goals.title: Meet Technical & Compliance Standards
goals.statement: Ensure the website meets performance, accessibility, security, and legal requirements for a professional services firm.
kpis: SSL Labs grade: A or higher
